children.heading: Small cigars
children.label: 1 Small cigars
children.text: On cigars, weighing not more than 3 pounds per thousand, $50.33 per thousand;

children.heading: Large cigars
children.label: 2 Large cigars
children.text: On cigars weighing more than 3 pounds per thousand, a tax equal to 52.75 percent of the price for which sold but not more than 40.26 cents per cigar.

children.heading: Small cigarettes
children.label: 1 Small cigarettes
children.text: On cigarettes, weighing not more than 3 pounds per thousand, $50.33 per thousand;

children.heading: Large cigarettes
children.label: 2 Large cigarettes
children.text: On cigarettes, weighing more than 3 pounds per thousand, $105.69 per thousand; except that, if more than 6½ inches in length, they shall be taxable at the rate prescribed for cigarettes weighing not more than 3 pounds per thousand, counting each 2¾ inches, or fraction thereof, of the length of each as one cigarette.

children.heading: Cigarette papers
children.label: c Cigarette papers
children.text: On cigarette papers, manufactured in or imported into the United States, there shall be imposed a tax of 3.15 cents for each 50 papers or fractional part thereof; except that, if cigarette papers measure more than 6½ inches in length, they shall be taxable at the rate prescribed, counting each 2¾ inches, or fraction thereof, of the length of each as one cigarette paper.

children.heading: Cigarette tubes
children.label: d Cigarette tubes
children.text: On cigarette tubes, manufactured in or imported into the United States, there shall be imposed a tax of 6.30 cents for each 50 tubes or fractional part thereof, except that if cigarette tubes measure more than 6½ inches in length, they shall be taxable at the rate prescribed, counting each 2¾ inches, or fraction thereof, of the length of each as one cigarette tube.

children.heading: Snuff
children.label: 1 Snuff
children.text: On snuff, $1.51 per pound and a proportionate tax at the like rate on all fractional parts of a pound.

children.heading: Chewing tobacco
children.label: 2 Chewing tobacco
children.text: On chewing tobacco, 50.33 cents per pound and a proportionate tax at the like rate on all fractional parts of a pound.

children.heading: Pipe tobacco
children.label: f Pipe tobacco
children.text: On pipe tobacco, manufactured in or imported into the United States, there shall be imposed a tax of $2.8311 cents per pound (and a proportionate tax at the like rate on all fractional parts of a pound).

children.heading: Roll-your-own tobacco
children.label: g Roll-your-own tobacco
children.text: On roll-your-own tobacco, manufactured in or imported into the United States, there shall be imposed a tax of $24.78 per pound (and a proportionate tax at the like rate on all fractional parts of a pound).

children.heading: Imported tobacco products and cigarette papers and tubes
children.label: h Imported tobacco products and cigarette papers and tubes
children.text: The taxes imposed by this section on tobacco products and cigarette papers and tubes imported into the United States shall be in addition to any import duties imposed on such articles, unless such import duties are imposed in lieu of internal revenue tax.
